name: Cooking Clash
description: Welcome to the bustling and exciting world of the kitchen - Cooking Clash. This exciting time-management experience turns you into a busy chef handling nonstop customer orders. If you enjoy energetic simulator gameplay mixed with cooking challenges, this one will instantly pull you in. It’s a great pick for anyone who enjoys fast thinking and kitchen chaos!
instructions: On PC Q to switch the weapon E to shoot On Mobile Click the on-screen button to operate
